theme_and_archetype.description: A high-performance, command-center feel tailored for a Discord/TeamSpeak alternative. It uses deep obsidian anchors, clear structural lines, and electric indigo kinetic triggers to maintain a modern, uncluttered, and highly performant appearance.

rules: No generic sans for headings. Use Manrope for high-tech personality.
Overlines and channel categories MUST use tiny_label scale.
High density text layout for messages: line-height should be normal or relaxed, with distinct visual separation between messages.
Never use pure black #000000. Use #0A0A0A for the deepest background (Server List).
Color is for function only. Use Primary for active states, unread indicators, and primary CTAs.
Ensure all text meets 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the dark backgrounds.

layout_and_spacing.structure: 4-Pane App Layout (Server Sidebar, Channel Sidebar, Main Chat View, Member Sidebar).
rules: Height MUST be h-screen with overflow-hidden on the main wrapper. Individual panes must handle their own overflow-y-auto.
Cardless design. Use 1px borders (border-border/40) to separate panes, not shadows.
Grid children must be direct children. Avoid excessive wrappers.

buttons.style: Sharp or max rounded-md (6px). No pill buttons unless it's an icon-only floating action.

inputs.style: bg-surface_chat border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm

chat_input.style: A solid, slightly elevated bar at the bottom of the chat view. bg-surface_hover rounded-lg border border-border/50

server_icons.style: rounded-[24px] transition-all duration-200 hover:rounded-[12px] hover:bg-primary cursor-pointer w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-surface_hover

rules: All interactive elements MUST have a hover state.
Server icons should transition border-radius on hover (Discord style: rounded-[24px] -> rounded-[12px]).
Use Framer Motion for subtle entry animations (e.g., modals, toast notifications).
Disable motion if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor icons with weight='bold' or weight='fill' depending on active state. They offer a clean, technical look perfect for dense apps.

rules: Only use the provided URLs below. DO NOT use placeholders.
Avatars should be circular and small (w-8 h-8 or w-10 h-10) in the UI.

login_hero_bg.description: Dark abstract architectural background for the login/bootstrap page.

rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required font families (Manrope and IBM Plex Sans) via Google Fonts in index.html.
Install @phosphor-icons/react and use it for all iconography. DO NOT use lucide-react.
Update tailwind.config.js and index.css to map HSL/Hex values to the provided custom color palette (Obsidian, Surface, Primary). Force dark mode as default.
Use Shadcn UI for Dialogs, Dropdowns, Tooltips, and Forms, but customize them heavily to remove the 'Vercel look'. Use pure flat backgrounds and 1px borders, no soft shadows.
The main app layout MUST be an h-screen flex-row layout: Server Sidebar (72px) -> Channel Sidebar (240px) -> Chat Area (flex-1) -> Member Sidebar (240px).
Implement the 'squircle' radius transition for Server List icons (rounded-3xl to rounded-xl on hover).
NEVER USE PLACEHOLDER IMAGES. Use the exact URLs provided in media_and_images.
